hero_headline: Seafront villa with private pool steps from Sitges marina

highlights.text: Three-bedroom villa sleeping up to 6 guests with 2 bathrooms
Private pool and stunning sea views
Ten-minute walk to the old town
Steps from the marina in Sitges, Spain

about_section: Casa del Mar is a bright three-bedroom villa located steps from the marina in Sitges, Spain. This seafront property accommodates up to 6 guests across 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, with a private pool and sea views. Guests can walk to the old town in ten minutes, making it an ideal base for exploring the area.

amenity_descriptions.text: Enjoy your own private swimming pool with spotless maintenance throughout your stay.
Air conditioning keeps the villa comfortable even during the warmest summer months.
Stay connected with high-speed broadband internet access throughout the property.
Complimentary parking is available on-site for your convenience.
A dishwasher in the kitchen makes cleanup effortless after meals.
